creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
chinsan     2006-10-22 11:38:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository (doc committer)

  Modified files:
    www/dokuwiki-devel   Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update to rc2006-10-19 (RC3)
    This releaes adds some bugfixes for the new changelog system, fixes
    minor issues in the installer and other parts of DokuWiki, and closes
    an XSS vulnerability.
  
  PR:             ports/104644
  Submitted by:   chinsan
  Approved by:    portmgr (erwin)
                  delphij (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.30      +1 -1      ports/www/dokuwiki-devel/Makefile
  1.16      +3 -3      ports/www/dokuwiki-devel/distinfo
  1.6       +4 -0      ports/www/dokuwiki-devel/pkg-plist
